imperial.strategic_description: This civ is versatile, with strength across Ranged and Infantry -- allowing flexible strategies that adapt to any opponent. Strong anti-cavalry defense with Halberdier to hold positions against cavalry pushes. Vulnerable to massed archers -- consider aggressive play before ranged compositions develop. Siege options are limited -- look to win through open-field engagements rather than pushing fortifications.

This civ has strong infantry for frontline pressure, with Elite Jaguar Warrior serving as the backbone of siege-backed pushes. Limited counter options mean this civ must play aggressively and press its advantage before opponents can mass their army. An infantry ram push is the signature play -- use Elite Jaguar Warrior as a meatshield to protect rams pushing into enemy bases.

This civ has strong ranged options for concentrated pushes, with Heavy Scorpion providing range advantage and sustained damage output. Limited counter options mean this civ must play aggressively and press its advantage before opponents can mass their army. Pushing behind trebuchets maximizes the ranged advantage -- set up trebs and let Heavy Scorpion protect them.

This civ is versatile, with strength across Cavalry and Ranged -- allowing flexible strategies that adapt to any opponent. Can answer enemy cavalry with mobile Heavy Camel Rider, allowing counter-raids and flexible responses. Good skirmishers help shut down archer compositions. Pushing behind trebuchets maximizes the ranged advantage -- set up trebs and let Elite Genitour protect them.

Pushing behind trebuchets maximizes the ranged advantage -- set up trebs and let Elite Hussite Wagon protect them.

Bombard Cannons provide long-range siege power for breaking through fortified positions.
